defs: Acceptance; reception; favorable reception or regard; state of being acceptable.
quotes: This is saying worthy of all acceptation.
Some things . . . are notwithstanding of so great dignity and acceptation with God.

defs: The meaning in which a word or expression is understood, or generally received; as, term is to be used according to its usual acceptation.
quotes: My words, in common acceptation, Could never give this provocation.
